Home›Free Facility Inspection
No Obligation · No Cost · MBE Certified Team

Free Facility Cleaning Audit —
Know Exactly Where You Stand

GreenPoint visits your facility, performs ATP bioluminescence testing on high-touch surfaces, documents conditions with photographs, and delivers a professional report — completely free, no strings attached.

Book Your Free Inspection
What's Included

A Real Audit. Not a Sales Pitch.

Every free inspection follows the same protocol we use when onboarding new clients — rigorous, documented, and data-driven.

On-Site Walkthrough

A trained GreenPoint facility assessor physically walks every area of your building — offices, restrooms, common areas, cafeteria, stairwells — documenting current conditions.

ATP Bioluminescence Testing

We test high-touch surfaces (door handles, light switches, countertops, fixtures) using the same ATP testing technology hospitals use to verify clinical cleanliness. Every reading is recorded.

Photographic Documentation

Timestamped photos of all findings — areas of concern, surface conditions, and equipment observed — organized in a systematic report.

Professional PDF Report

Within 48 hours of the inspection, you receive a formal report with all ATP readings, photographs, findings, and specific cleaning recommendations. No vague assessments — data-driven results.

Simple Process

How It Works

01

Book Your Inspection

Fill out the form below with your facility details and preferred date. We confirm within one business day.

02

We Inspect

Our assessor visits your facility, conducts ATP testing on high-touch surfaces, and photographs current conditions throughout.

03

You Get a Report

Within 48 hours, you receive a professional PDF with ATP readings, photos, findings, and actionable recommendations — no obligation.

Who Benefits

The Free Inspection Is Designed For

Government Facility Managers

Audit your current vendor's performance with objective ATP data before your next contract renewal.

School Administrators

Know your facility's cleanliness scores before the DOH or state inspection arrives.

Medical Office Directors

Verify that high-touch surfaces in exam rooms and waiting areas meet clinical cleanliness standards.

Houses of Worship

Evaluate your nursery, fellowship hall, and sanctuary cleanliness with documented results for your board.

Commercial Facility Directors

Evaluate your current cleaning provider's performance with data, not impressions.

Any Facility Evaluating Vendors

Use our independent report to establish a baseline and set expectations for any cleaning provider.

Book Your Inspection

Schedule Your Free Facility Audit

We confirm within one business day and coordinate a time that works around your facility schedule.

No obligation. No cost. We'll confirm within one business day.
